title: Why Retro Arcade Games Still Work Today
excerpt: Why simple arcade gameplay, high scores, and replayability still work well on modern mobile devices.

title: Creating Retro Style Mobile Games
excerpt: How BarkinMad Studios creates retro-inspired mobile games for modern devices.

title: Building ZXSnake
excerpt: A look at the design ideas behind ZXSnake and why simple arcade gameplay still works well on mobile.

title: Designing ZXBrick Power-Ups
excerpt: How power-ups add variety, risk, and replayability to ZXBrick.

title: Coding With AI
excerpt: How AI tools are helping accelerate indie game and app development.

title: 32-Language Support Across the ZX Series
excerpt: The ZX Series now supports 32 languages, bringing retro-inspired arcade gaming to players around the world with fully localised gameplay, achievements, and Game Center content.

title: Bringing PvP Multiplayer to ZXSnake
excerpt: ZXSnake expands on the classic arcade formula with local and online PvP multiplayer, allowing players to compete against friends and rivals around the world.

title: ZXSpace is Under Development
excerpt: ZXSpace is a retro-inspired arcade space shooter currently in development, featuring fast-paced action, unlockable content, achievements, leaderboards, and classic gameplay reimagined for modern mobile devices.
